scripts.setup:all: npm run setup && npm run setup:backend
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace frontend" "npm run dev --workspace backend"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace frontend && npm run build --workspace backend
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run preview --workspace frontend" "npm run start --workspace backend"
scripts.clean:pycache: python3 -c "from pathlib import Path; import shutil; [shutil.rmtree(p, ignore_errors=True) for p in Path('.').rglob('__pycache__')]; [p.unlink() for p in Path('.').rglob('*.pyc')]"
